no_executable_plan.PL-001-004: Source defect: the codification clause identifies nonexistent section 3(a). The only plausible correction is section 2(a), but the Act is recorded repealed and no reliable repeal instrument was located. No statutory text is invented.
no_executable_plan.PL-002-005: Superseded by Public Law 19-149, sections 6-8, which expressly repealed Public Law 2-5 and enacted a replacement sentencing scheme.
no_executable_plan.PL-002-006: Repealed and replaced by Public Law 14-89, sections 3-6. Adding the superseded Title 18 sections now would reintroduce the displaced 2021 scheme.
no_executable_plan.PL-003-025: Its remaining frameworks were repealed and replaced by Public Laws 38-263 and 38-264; Public Law 38-264 expressly repealed Titles V and VI and amendments made by them.
